overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a horse-drawn carriage journey through a sunlit prairie landscape. The carriage travels along dirt trails through tall grass and scattered trees, passing wild horses before arriving at a hilltop campsite with covered wagons.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail with red rock formations

events.description: carriage turns left around a large pine tree

agents.ego_description: steering the horse-drawn carriage along the dirt trail, navigating a left turn around a tree

entered.detail: large reddish-brown rock outcropping visible on the horizon
reddish-brown dirt path winding through the prairie
tall evergreen tree marking the turn point

segments.scene_description: The carriage begins along a dirt trail through open prairie, with distinctive red rock formations visible in the distance. The camera follows from behind as the vehicle approaches and navigates a left turn around a large pine tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy prairie with scattered oak trees

agents.ego_description: traveling steadily through the grassland, following the winding dirt path

entered.detail: isolated oak and pine trees dotting the prairie landscape
tall green and golden prairie grass lining both sides of the trail
tall thin structure visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Traveling through rolling grassland with scattered trees, the carriage follows a winding dirt path. The red rocks disappear behind as the landscape opens into pure prairie terrain with tall grass swaying in the breeze.

events.description: herd of wild horses appears grazing on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail, passing wild horses grazing peacefully

notable_agents.action: white and black wild horses grazing peacefully beside the trail

entered.detail: group of untamed horses grazing in the tall grass
elevated clearing with wagons and tents becoming visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: As the carriage continues, a group of wild horses comes into view grazing on the right. The path leads toward a hilltop where a campsite with wagons becomes visible in the distance.

events.description: carriage arrives at the hilltop campsite with wagons and tents
carriage slows and turns around near the camp

agents.ego_description: arriving at the campsite and maneuvering the carriage to turn around

notable_agents.action: person standing near the camp wagons observing the carriage

entered.detail: wooden covered wagons with canvas tops parked at the camp
canvas tents set up in the campsite

segments.scene_description: The carriage arrives at a hilltop campsite featuring covered wagons and tents. After approaching the camp where a person stands near the wagons, the carriage slows and begins to turn around, revealing the expansive valley and mountain range in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rugged prairie trail toward a bustling hilltop campsite overlooking a vast mountain range. It begins behind a horse-drawn carriage navigating a dirt path past distant red rock formations, turning left around a large pine tree. As the carriage moves forward, the red rocks fade from view and the landscape opens into rolling grasslands where tall grass sways in the breeze. The scene then shifts as a group of wild horses appears grazing to the right, while the path leads the camera upward toward a distant cluster of wagons. Finally, the carriage arrives at the hilltop camp among tents and people before slowing to a turn, revealing an expansive valley and towering mountains in the background.
